reasons_for_inclusion: Definitive recent analysis (2022) of Pico's Apology and heresy trial by the leading Pico scholar
Provides source-critical readings of all 13 condemned theses with original philological discoveries (Cabrol transmission in Q6)
Directly revises received historiography: dismantles humanist-Pico frame for the Apology
Essential for the condemned_theses, apology, heresy, and free_will concept essays
editorial_angle: Present as the authoritative 2022 revisionist reading of the trial; pair with Edelheit's Crossroads for the scholastic-formation context.
curator_notes: Full five-chapter reading required before scholar profile for Copenhaver is updated. Do not treat ch. 1 findings as representative of the whole book.
